name: Reduced to a pet | TG TF
description:
Your life has been changing upside down, being in the palm of a rich, popular girl. You lose all your dignity and pride once she gets a collar on your neck...

It's your first day at boarding school and something interesting already happened... The popular girl get to be your new roommate and she decide to turn you into her new pet!

⚠︎ CW: Forcefeminization, Body horror, Gender dysphoria, Misgendering, Possible identity death, BDSM, Sex, etc. ‼
creator: Milkylxtte
